subject: Re: Guest slot this Saturday - grief and resilience
body:
Angela,

Interview format is perfect - I'll open with a question about what drew you to anticipatory grief work and then let it breathe from there. Twenty minutes is exactly right.

Parking: use Lot C on Beale, code 7734. I'll put your name on the visitor sheet.

So glad you're joining us.

Rebecca

subject: Re: Health fair - October date confirmed
body:
Deacon Mosley,

October 3 works. I'm reaching out to Sandra Coles about the nursing students today - that partnership is a blessing every year and I expect she'll say yes.

I'll do the opening devotional. Just leave me 8-10 minutes at the top before the stations open.

More details to follow once I hear back from Sandra.

Rebecca

subject: Pre-recorded episode - theme proposal
body:
TJ,

For the pre-recorded broadcast we'll air the Saturday I'm out, I'm thinking the theme 'Freedom as a Practice' - drawing on the spiritual discipline of liberty as a way of living. I can record Thursday January 22 after my shift ends at 3:30 PM. Studio availability?

Music picks: Lauren Daigle's 'You Say,' Brandi Carlile's 'The Story,' and closing with a classic - 'Blessed Assurance.' Let me know if Bluff City Auto Care wants a custom read for that weekend.

Rebecca
